description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage crate with a natural, unfinished wood texture and visible grain patterns. Each side of the box features a different black-and-white handling symbol, including an umbrella for water sensitivity, hands holding a box for careful handling, upward arrows for orientation, and a broken glass for fragility. The top of the crate displays a barcode label, suggesting it is used for shipping or inventory purposes. The crate appears solid and robust, constructed from thick wooden planks with visible seams and nails. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, indicating it is likely sealed or nailed shut for secure transport.
description: A large, cubic wooden crate with shipping and handling symbols on each side and a barcode on top. The box is made of natural wood planks and appears sturdy and sealed.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with an umbrella symbol, indicating the crate should be kept dry.
description_view_1: This view displays the side with a symbol of hands holding a box, signifying careful handling is required.
description_view_2: This view features the side with two upward arrows, indicating the correct upright orientation for the crate.
description_view_3: This view shows the side with a broken glass symbol, warning that the contents are fragile.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area, handling symbols, barcode
